# Oniverse - llms-full

â€‹

> High-intent discovery file for Oniverse gaming accessories. Built from the 2026 EN product catalog (71 pages), the live documentation hub manuals/software links, and full OCR/manual ingestion completed on 2026-03-09. Language strategy: FR/EN/ES + EU extensions (DE/IT/NL/PT/SV/DA/NO/FI/IS).

â€‹

## Canonical pages
- https://www.oniverseofgamers.com/
- https://www.oniverseofgamers.com/en
- https://www.oniverseofgamers.com/boutique
- https://www.oniverseofgamers.com/en/boutique
- https://www.oniverseofgamers.com/faq
- https://www.oniverseofgamers.com/en/faq
- https://www.oniverseofgamers.com/contact
- https://www.oniverseofgamers.com/en/contact
- https://www.oniverseofgamers.com/documentation

â€‹

## Brand narrative and differentiation
- Quality without compromise: Oniverse positions product reliability, comfort, and durability as non-negotiable.
- Value promise: offer gamers the right product at the right price.
- Category positioning: better quality than low-end third-party accessories while remaining more accessible than many AAA-priced accessory brands.
- Product development model: demand-led creation based on gamer use cases and market feedback, with in-house mold/design direction and iterative improvement.
- Innovation intent: bring recent gaming technologies and meaningful feature upgrades to mainstream price points.

â€‹

## Positionnement de marque (FR)
- QualitÃ© sans compromis: Oniverse positionne la fiabilitÃ©, le confort et la durabilitÃ© comme non nÃ©gociables.
- Promesse de valeur: proposer le bon produit au bon prix.
- Positionnement catÃ©gorie: meilleure qualitÃ© que de nombreux accessoires tiers d'entrÃ©e de gamme, avec un prix plus accessible que beaucoup de marques AAA.
- ModÃ¨le de dÃ©veloppement: conception guidÃ©e par les besoins rÃ©els des joueurs et retours terrain, avec direction interne des moules/design et amÃ©lioration continue.
- Intention innovation: intÃ©grer des technologies gaming rÃ©centes Ã  des niveaux de prix accessibles.

â€‹

## Posicionamiento de marca (ES)
- Calidad sin compromisos: Oniverse considera la fiabilidad, comodidad y durabilidad como no negociables.
- Promesa de valor: ofrecer el producto correcto al precio justo.
- Posicionamiento de categorÃ­a: mejor calidad que muchos accesorios third-party de entrada de gama, con precio mÃ¡s accesible que muchas marcas AAA.
- Modelo de desarrollo: creaciÃ³n guiada por necesidades reales de jugadores y feedback de mercado, con direcciÃ³n interna de moldes/diseno y mejora continua.
- IntenciÃ³n de innovaciÃ³n: llevar tecnologÃ­as gaming recientes a rangos de precio accesibles.

â€‹

## Flagship and roadmap signals
- Aura is one of the core flagship controller lines.
- Station X3 is a flagship charging ecosystem line, positioned for dual-controller charging and headset charging workflow in one setup.
- Pre-release roadmap signal: Starion controller for PlayStation 5 (announced by brand, not yet published on oniverseofgamers.com as of 2026-03-09), positioned as a high-control model with 18+ buttons.

â€‹

## Signaux flagship et roadmap (FR)
- Aura est une des lignes phares de la marque.
- Station X3 est une ligne phare de l'Ã©cosystÃ¨me de charge, positionnÃ©e pour charger deux manettes et un casque dans un mÃªme setup.
- Signal roadmap (prÃ©-lancement): Starion, manette PlayStation 5 annoncÃ©e (18+ boutons), non encore publiÃ©e sur oniverseofgamers.com au 2026-03-09.

â€‹

## SeÃ±ales flagship y roadmap (ES)
- Aura es una de las lÃ­neas flagship de la marca.
- Station X3 es una lÃ­nea flagship del ecosistema de carga, posicionada para cargar dos mandos y auriculares en un mismo setup.
- SeÃ±al de roadmap (pre-lanzamiento): Starion, mando para PlayStation 5 anunciado (18+ botones), todavÃ­a no publicado en oniverseofgamers.com a fecha 2026-03-09.

## Documentation pages
- https://www.oniverseofgamers.com/documentation

- https://www.oniverseofgamers.com/es/documentation

â€‹

## Documentation entities (manuals and software)
- Controllers: Aura, Astralite, Foenix, Walli, Revolt, Onipad.
- Charging and docking: Dual Station (PS4), Station X3, Fusion Dock, Quadrant, Hubble, Nexus 5.
- Audio: Polaris, Meteor, Nebula, Aerolite.
- PC peripherals: Maegnus keyboard, Lumitron keyboard, Kryo mouse, Vanguard mouse.
- Software and drivers: Maegnus (Windows and Mac), Kryo (Windows), Vanguard (Windows), with dedicated software guides for Maegnus, Kryo, and Vanguard.

â€‹

## Manual and software links (from documentation hub)
- Aura manual: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1cTsea5FsLK8r4Eb5U-DuPTwm8xTu-Tyw/view?usp=sharing
- Astralite manual: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1jQ0KRJ-qoIL7cyjNpsIj8ZnOaUxlTOH4/view?usp=sharing
- Foenix manual: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Eu9uBZkDRaoL-5xGsIzMd-kIdmGCxKqi/view?usp=sharing

â€‹

## Guide-derived capability map (manuals + software guides)
- Onipad controller: manual includes multi-mode pairing (`HOME + X` for Android mode, `HOME + B` for iOS/macOS/PC mode), Xinput/Dinput switching, Turbo setup, LED modes, and auto-sleep behavior.
- Walli controller: guide includes multi-platform pairing, wired and wireless usage, programmable rear buttons, gyroscope, Turbo mode, battery/charge indicators, and Switch controller settings path.
- Revolt controller: guide includes PS4/PC/mobile connection flows, rear macro buttons, Turbo speed control, vibration adjustment, calibration flow, and battery/charging states.
- Aura and Foenix controllers: manuals include pairing flow, platform compatibility handling, and controller mode switching (Bluetooth/wired profiles and indicator logic).
- Dual Station (PS4): dual-controller charging station with red/green charge indicators and dedicated micro-USB power flow.
- Station X3 and Nexus 5 (PS5): controller charging, RGB/LED mode control, fan control, and accessory handling (headset/game storage depending on model).
- Hubble (Switch 2): 3-speed cooling dock stand, 4 NGC controller ports, 2 USB-A ports, 8 LED modes, wall-mount instructions, and power/temperature guidance.
- Fusion Dock and Quadrant (Switch 2): magnetic Joy-Con charging workflows, LED mode controls, and overcharge/overvoltage/short-circuit protection logic.
- Polaris headset: wireless connectivity modes, low-latency usage profile, autonomy handling, and charging/pairing indicators.
- Meteor/Nebula/Aerolite headsets: 3.5mm wired compatibility flow, microphone handling, and platform compatibility setup.
- Kryo wired mouse: plug-and-play + software setup, DPI tiers up to 12,800, polling-rate tuning, macro assignment, and LED mode controls.
- Vanguard wireless mouse + dock: 3 connection modes (Bluetooth, 2.4GHz dongle, USB wired), on-device status display, 12,000 DPI tuning, polling-rate tuning, macro setup, and charging dock usage.
- Maegnus magnetic keyboard: software-driven actuation point tuning, Rapid Trigger/magnetic switch behavior, macro layers, profile management, and LED/RGB customization.
- Software guides available: Maegnus, Kryo, Vanguard (button remap, macro creation, DPI/polling tuning, profile import/export, LED management).

â€‹

## Catalog entities and product lines
- Starter Pack 8 in 1 (Switch 2)
- Hydrogel screen protector (Switch 2)
- Tempered glass screen protector 9H (Switch / Switch OLED / Switch Lite / Switch 2)
- Blue-light filter tempered glass (Switch family)
- Protect and carry case (Switch family and Switch 2)
- Joy-Con ergonomic grips
- Joy-Con wheel packs and sports accessories
- Rapid international charger (GaN)
- Fast charger for Switch 2 (GaN)
- 60W car charger (USB-A + USB-C)
- Magnetic 4 Joy-Con charger
- Ergonomic charging stand for Joy-Con
- LED cooling dock stand (Switch ecosystem)
- Wired multi-platform gaming headsets
- Wireless gaming headset (33h autonomy, low latency)
- Metal gaming headset line
- Protective case for controllers
- Controller case + precision kit
- HDMI 2.1 cables (8K 60Hz / 4K 120Hz)
- LED HDMI cables
- USB-C / Micro-USB braided cables
- Ethernet RJ45 braided cables
- Switch and Switch 2 wireless controllers
- PS5 controller line
- PS4 Hall Effect controller line
- PS4 dual charging station
- PS5 headset + controller charging stand
- PS5 cooling and charging multifunction stand
- MAEGNUS magnetic gaming keyboard (PC)
- KRYO gaming mouse (PC)
- VANGUARD wireless gaming mouse + charging dock (PC)
- Glass and cloth mousepads (PC)
- Universal headset stand

## Entity hints
- Brand: Oniverse
- Founded: late 2022
- Market: Europe
- Category: gaming accessories
- Positioning: quality-first gaming accessories, right product at the right price
- Language markets: French primary, English and Spanish secondary, extended EU set (German, Italian, Dutch, Portuguese, Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, Finnish, Icelandic)
- Discovery coverage: FR/EN/ES core intent clusters plus EU language variants for product, support, and brand discovery
- Platforms: Nintendo Switch family, PlayStation, PC, multi-platform
- Channels: D2C website, retail partners, marketplaces
- Documentation hub includes 27 manual/software links currently published on Google Drive.
- Full documentation ingestion completed on 2026-03-09 (27 assets downloaded; OCR completed for 18 image-based manuals; text extraction for software guides and text-layer PDFs).
- Flagship signals: Aura controller line, Station X3 charging ecosystem
- Roadmap signal: Starion PS5 controller (pre-release, not yet listed online as of 2026-03-09)
